package rulefixtures

// scenario for bufio_scanner_small_buffer_for_large_lines: `bufio.NewScanner(r)` without `scanner.Buffer()` when processing files with lines > 64KB
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule443PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario443Positive(records []Rule443PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
